briefdescription.para: This function validates the input ECC parameters.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XAsu_EccParams structure which holds the parameters of ECC input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if ECC parameters are validated successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if parameter validation fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate that exactly one of KeyAddr or KeyId is provided.

briefdescription.para: This function validates ECC parameters for public key generation.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if ECC parameters are validated successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if parameter validation fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate that exactly one of PvtKey.KeyAddr or PvtKey.KeyId is provided.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if ECC parameters are validated successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if parameter validation fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate that exactly one of PvtKey.KeyAddr or PvtKey.KeyId is provided.
Validate that exactly one of PubKey.KeyAddr or PubKey.KeyId is provided.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to generate an ECDSA signature for the provided hash by using the given private key associated with the elliptic curve.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_EccParams structure which holds the parameters of ECC input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to validate the ECDSA signature for the provided hash using the provided ecc public key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_EccParams structure which holds the parameters of ECC input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to generate public key for the specified elliptic curve using the provided private key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_EccKeyParams structure which holds the parameters of ECC input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_CURVEINFO, if curve info is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to validate the provided ECC public key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_EccKeyParams structure which holds the parameters of ECC input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_CURVEINFO, if curve info is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Key manager is not supported for ECC validate public key; KeyId must be 0.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to perform ECC Known Answer Tests (KAT's).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Type of supported elliptic curve for KAT.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW, to generate an ECDH shared secret, by using the provided ECC public key and private key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_EcdhParams structure which holds the parameters of ECDH input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform ECDH Known Answer Tests (KAT's).

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for ECC driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 yog 08/19/24 Initial release yog 09/26/24 Added doxygen grouping and fixed doxygen comments. yog 11/27/24 Included input parameters validation. ss 12/02/24 Added support for ECDH yog 02/21/25 Changed XAsu_EccValidateCurveInfo() API to be non-static yog 03/25/25 Added support for public key generation. yog 07/11/25 Added support for Edward curves.
